contents.value:
## `--rootfs-dir`

Overrides the path to the root filesystem that populates the partition. Useful in multi-rootfs images where different partitions are populated from different build directories.

- `--rootfs-dir=rootfs1`: Uses the directory named `rootfs1` under the image work directory.
- `--rootfs-dir=${IMAGE_ROOTFS}/boot`: Uses an absolute or variable-expanded path.

Without this option, Wic uses the default `IMAGE_ROOTFS` directory.
